data.name: 关节模组与驱动系统设计（Actuator & Drive）
电子电气与能源系统（Electronics & Power）
전기 임피던스 단층촬영법을 이용한 가변 강성 소프트 로봇의 형상 감지

data.description: Shape Sensing of Variable Stiffness Soft Robots using Electrical Impedance Tomography discusses Design of Joint Module and Actuator & Drive.
Shape Sensing of Variable Stiffness Soft Robots using Electrical Impedance Tomography discusses Electronics & Power Systems.
